name: BottomSheet
description: Modal surface anchored to the bottom of the viewport, used for a focused commit (an action menu, a confirmation, a short form) that should not navigate the user away from the underlying screen. Single-spec family.
wrapperGuidance: Renders into a body portal (or owns its own surface chrome). Place the call as a sibling of the page shell — do NOT wrap in a layout container, padding div, or className="px-*". Full-bleed children inside the surface body get the negative-margin opt-out — see AGENTS.md § Composition rules.
